title: Pi-Native Initialization Compiler (/init) and Source-Backed /create
approach: Redesign /init as the truthful first lifecycle touch: a hybrid compiler producing the complete Pi-native project packet (root AGENTS.md + .pi/{ROADMAP,user,tech-stack,state,memory}.md) with verbatim managed boilerplate, crash-safe refresh, and an exact handoff to source-backed /create. Migrate all runtime context from .opencode to .pi (no compatibility shims); ADR-016 supersedes only ADR-007's memory location. Eight strictly serial child plans; .pi/state.md stays partial until the final static gate, then ready as the last production write. Serialized behind away-sandbox-runtime under operator Option B (reserve: pi-native-init active; away-sandbox-runtime paused at B3; C1-D3 deferred, reconcile-on-resume; B1 owns the same shared authority files). Operator resolutions: mandatory full packet always; hybrid compiler; .pi/ROADMAP.md sole default; structured cards; .pi/user.md tracked approved-only; source-backed /create <slug> --from <path[#anchor]>; plain /init fresh-only + --refresh; curated horizons; verbatim boilerplate everywhere; crash-safe partial-before-mutation ordering; source is untrusted data with exact bounds and stable-byte provenance. Review-gate corrections accepted: complete ADR-016 contract in canonical PLAN; remove (not repoint) verification cache/skip/append; final no-write pass reruns away-sandbox D3; smoke covers packet-rejection, slug-before-packet, and post-preview drift. P1 corrections: write_paths=38; state.context_reload_required; AGENTS mutation -> partial until /reload; interview intent in .pi/memory.md before roadmap; ROADMAP monotonic last_issued_id; /create memory + ready-packet/hash gate; P6.3 exact .opencode/artifacts/.active; fail-closed rg (exit 1 only); P7.1 includes .pi/away-sandbox.json; autonomous Gate 0.4 blocks autonomous-away-loop until P8.3.
blocks: away-sandbox-runtime paused at B3 (operator Option B: reserve pi-native-init; C1-D3 deferred, reconcile-on-resume); shared authority-file ownership AGENTS.md, DECISIONS.md, PLAN.md
autonomous-away-loop spec/plan/prd synchronization (blocked by Gate 0.4 until pi-native-init P8.3)

manifests.baseline_oid: pending: frozen at P1.1 at HEAD e15881f under operator Option B (reserve; away-sandbox-runtime paused at B3; C1-D3 deferred, reconcile-on-resume); feature-scoped baseline (absolute byte-equality unachievable under concurrent churn; binding check is feature-scoped: pi-native-init commits must not touch protected paths)

success_criteria.criterion: Init prompt: --from/--deep/--refresh present; --context/--user/--all absent; all six Pi-native outputs; no 60/150 line cap
Managed boilerplate byte-identical across AGENTS.md, .pi/prompts/init.md, and the locked fixture; agents_boilerplate_sha256 in .pi/state.md matches
.pi/state.md frontmatter has schema_version: 1, initialization_status: partial|ready, and context_reload_required: true|false
Packet completeness: AGENTS.md and .pi/{ROADMAP,user,tech-stack,state,memory}.md all exist
success_criteria.verify: test -f AGENTS.md && test -f .pi/ROADMAP.md && test -f .pi/user.md && test -f .pi/tech-stack.md && test -f .pi/state.md && test -f .pi/memory.md

success_criteria.criterion: Create: --from <path[#anchor]> present; raw mode retained; slug validation precedes packet/source access; /create is sole mkdir namespace creator
Create source contract: bounds, secret denylist, no-symlink/no-truncation, untrusted-data rule, provenance fields; no roadmap mutation
Lifecycle packet gate: plan/research/ship/verify require slug then ready packet before memory/lifecycle access; /gc gates before memory/action and keeps memory read-only
Pi-native memory path; no active .opencode runtime context paths in runtime contracts (excluding historical ADR-007 text)

Skills portability: no active .opencode runtime deps, no exact .opencode/artifacts/.active coordination path, no global verify.log in .pi/skills (must NOT false-positive on legitimate text like participants.active); development-lifecycle makes /init the first hook
ADR-016 present; ADR-007 historical text preserved and marked partially superseded

Canonical PLAN.md encodes the complete ADR-016 contract (mandatory /init, six-file packet, state ordering, packet gates, both /create syntaxes, source bounds/provenance, exact roadmap grammar, Pi-native memory)
Roadmap grammar: roadmap_schema_version: 1, unique RM-NNN, exact Autonomy/Open decisions values, away-eligibility rule

Roadmap ID allocation: .pi/ROADMAP.md frontmatter has monotonic last_issued_id: RM-NNN; IDs never reused/renumbered; refresh preserves IDs by normalized outcome and never decrements the high-water mark
No regression in milestone-3/4 static suite (frontmatter, forbidden CLEAN, slug presence, namespace ownership, completion-authority split)
Source command bodies unchanged against the P1.1 baseline (feature-scoped: pi-native-init commits touch none)
prd graph bounded: 2-3 tasks per child plan, <=3 files per task, ID-based deps point backward
success_criteria.verify: node -e 'const p=require("./.opencode/artifacts/pi-native-init/prd.json");const ids=new Map(p.tasks.map((t,i)=>[t.id,i]));if(ids.size!==p.tasks.length)throw new Error("dup/missing id");const bc={};for(const[i,t]of p.tasks.entries()){if(t.files.length>3)throw new Error(t.id+": >3 files");if(!t.child_plan)throw new Error(t.id+": missing child_plan");bc[t.child_plan]=(bc[t.child_plan]||0)+1;for(const d of t.depends_on){if(!ids.has(d))throw new Error(t.id+": unknown dep "+d);if(ids.get(d)>=i)throw new Error(t.id+": dep not earlier")}}for(const[b,n]of Object.entries(bc)){if(n<2||n>3)throw new Error(b+": "+n+" tasks")}'

success_criteria.criterion: Final ready + no-write pass: .pi/state.md ready + context_reload_required: false, full static gate green, git diff --check clean
success_criteria.verify: rg -q '^initialization_status: ready$' .pi/state.md && rg -q '^context_reload_required: false$' .pi/state.md && bash .opencode/tool/structural-check.sh && git diff --check

tasks.title: Resolve ownership and lock canonical input (spec, prd, boilerplate fixture)
tasks.end_state: Operator Option B recorded (reserve pi-native-init; away-sandbox-runtime paused at B3; C1-D3 deferred, reconcile-on-resume). All ten P1 contract corrections applied to spec.md and prd.json. Exact operator-supplied AGENTS boilerplate persisted verbatim as .opencode/artifacts/pi-native-init/boilerplate.md (extracted from root AGENTS.md Rule 0 -> Safety + Note for Codex, in generated order; stop if absent rather than reconstruct); its SHA-256 recorded. Eight-plan dependency chain recorded. (baseline.md freeze is P1.2.)

tasks.title: Freeze feature-scoped baseline and make structural verification offline-safe and fail-closed
tasks.end_state: baseline.md frozen at P1.1 HEAD under Option B (feature-scoped: pi-native-init commits must not touch protected paths; absolute byte-equality unachievable under concurrent churn). structural-check.sh has no network-capable probe; uses an installed binary/local probe; Fallow skipped when absent, never installed or contacting a registry. Adds a fail-closed negative-match helper (rg exit 1 = clean; exit 0 = forbidden; exit >=2 = tool error) used by all negative checks. Adds Gate 0.4 to the autonomous-away-loop plan: pi-native-init P8.3 must complete before any autonomous-away-loop implementation begins. Checker still runs.

tasks.title: Establish ADR-016 and managed AGENTS (DECISIONS, PLAN, AGENTS)
tasks.end_state: ADR-016 added (supersedes only ADR-007 memory location; ADR-007 historical text + namespace decisions preserved, marked partially superseded). Canonical PLAN.md encodes the complete contract (mandatory /init, six-file packet, state ordering + context_reload_required, packet gates, both /create syntaxes, source bounds/provenance, exact roadmap grammar, Pi-native memory; 'no schemas' narrowed to lifecycle-kernel/typed-handoff). AGENTS.md has the exact boilerplate in its managed region (reordered so the full boilerplate Rule 0 -> Safety + Note for Codex is one contiguous managed block, with the Repository project appendix after the end marker); project routing/topology preserved in the appendix. Writing/refreshing AGENTS.md leaves .pi/state.md partial + context_reload_required: true (the only advertised next action is /reload then /init --refresh).
tasks.verify: rg -q '^## ADR-016:' .pi/artifacts/pi-template/DECISIONS.md && rg -q 'ADR-007' .pi/artifacts/pi-template/DECISIONS.md && rg -q 'pi:init:boilerplate:start' AGENTS.md && rg -q 'pi:init:boilerplate:end' AGENTS.md && git diff --check

tasks.title: Seed project facts, profile, and durable intent (tech-stack, user, memory)
tasks.end_state: .pi/tech-stack.md holds detected facts + command evidence (verified|documented|failed|unknown). .pi/user.md holds only operator-approved tracked preferences (no secrets, no inferred personal data). .pi/memory.md created with distilled non-sensitive project memory AND an immutable '## Initialization Intent - <generation-id>' section holding confirmed operator/project intent (interview-derived when no --from); this section is the provenance source for roadmap cards. Memory is seeded BEFORE the roadmap (P2.3).
tasks.verify: rg -q 'pi-fabric.*0.23.0' .pi/tech-stack.md && rg -q '^## Initialization Intent - ' .pi/memory.md && git diff --check

tasks.title: Seed roadmap and partial state (ROADMAP, state)
tasks.end_state: .pi/ROADMAP.md compiles project intent into the exact v1 grammar (roadmap_schema_version: 1; monotonic last_issued_id: RM-NNN frontmatter; 1-3 Ready cards; unresolved -> manual-only; unique immutable RM-NNN). Each card cites the stable .pi/memory.md Initialization Intent section path + whole-file SHA-256. .pi/state.md written LAST with schema_version: 1, initialization_status: partial, context_reload_required: true, agents_boilerplate_sha256 set. Packet NOT advertised as usable; /create --from NOT advertised as ready (state is partial + reload-required).
tasks.verify: rg -q '^roadmap_schema_version: 1$' .pi/ROADMAP.md && rg -q '^last_issued_id: RM-[0-9][0-9][0-9]$' .pi/ROADMAP.md && rg -q '### RM-001' .pi/ROADMAP.md && rg -q 'Autonomy:' .pi/ROADMAP.md && rg -q '^initialization_status: partial$' .pi/state.md && rg -q '^context_reload_required: true$' .pi/state.md && rg -q '^agents_boilerplate_sha256:' .pi/state.md && git diff --check

tasks.title: Add failing structural assertions for source-backed create
tasks.end_state: structural-check.sh asserts the new grammar, slug-before-packet/source ordering, mandatory ready packet (all six files + schema v1 + ready + context_reload_required: false + matching agents_boilerplate_sha256), source bounds, untrusted-data rule, provenance fields, no roadmap mutation, and preserved namespace/review/supervisor safeguards. Expected RED captured.

tasks.title: Implement source mode and packet gate in /create
tasks.end_state: .pi/prompts/create.md supports /create <slug> "description" and /create <slug> --from <path[#anchor]>. Validation order slug -> complete-ready-packet gate (all six files, schema v1, initialization_status: ready, context_reload_required: false, agents_boilerplate_sha256 matching managed AGENTS interior) -> namespace (absent/partial/established). Memory access uses .pi/memory.md (not .opencode/artifacts/MEMORY.md). Source guard + stable-byte procedure applied; zero/multiple anchor matches and multiple shippable outcomes blocked; provenance recorded in PLAN.md; .pi/ROADMAP.md never mutated. Fail-closed namespace ownership and all review/supervisor rules preserved.
tasks.verify: rg -q -- '--from' .pi/prompts/create.md && rg -q 'sha256' .pi/prompts/create.md && rg -q '.pi/memory.md' .pi/prompts/create.md && rg -q 'mkdir -p' .pi/prompts/create.md && git diff --check

tasks.title: Close the create gate
tasks.end_state: structural-check.sh create assertions GREEN; git diff --check clean. .pi/state.md remains partial.

tasks.title: Add failing init assertions
tasks.end_state: structural-check.sh asserts new flags, removed modes, all Pi-native outputs, no line cap, exact boilerplate equality, full state machine + write ordering, source bounds, prompt-injection treatment, drift checks, readiness outputs, reload barrier, monotonic roadmap ID. Only intended checks fail.

tasks.title: Rewrite /init compiler and refresh state machine
tasks.end_state: .pi/prompts/init.md implements absent/interrupted-without-state/established/partial/refresh classifications; hybrid compiler; full-packet preview + confirmation; fresh writes state last; refresh invalidation before mutation; re-preview on input/appendix drift; exact managed boilerplate + semantically reconciled appendix; READY/PARTIAL/response-only BLOCKED; exact /create --from handoff only when ready; no installs/network/secret-reads/source-triggered actions. Writing/refreshing AGENTS.md leaves state partial + context_reload_required: true and advertises only /reload then /init --refresh; only a post-/reload refresh with no drift writes ready + context_reload_required: false last, then emits the /create handoff. Interview mode writes confirmed intent to .pi/memory.md before compiling roadmap cards. Refresh preserves roadmap IDs by normalized outcome; never decrements last_issued_id; allocates a new ID for materially changed/new outcomes.
tasks.verify: rg -q -- '--from' .pi/prompts/init.md && rg -q -- '--refresh' .pi/prompts/init.md && rg -q 'pi:init:boilerplate:start' .pi/prompts/init.md && rg -q -i 'READY|PARTIAL|BLOCKED' .pi/prompts/init.md && git diff --check

tasks.title: Close the init gate
tasks.end_state: structural-check.sh init assertions GREEN; git diff --check clean. .pi/state.md remains partial.

tasks.title: Encode packet-gate assertions for lifecycle consumers
tasks.end_state: structural-check.sh asserts slug-before-packet for every slugged command; complete packet + schema v1 + ready + context_reload_required: false + matching boilerplate hash; /gc gates before memory/action; old-path rejection scoped to active runtime contracts (excluding historical ADR-007).

tasks.title: Migrate planning and delivery prompts (plan, research, ship)
tasks.end_state: .pi/prompts/plan.md, research.md, ship.md add the mandatory ready-packet gate after slug validation and replace active memory access with .pi/memory.md; preserve established/missing/partial namespace behavior; preserve response-only pre-create research once the packet is ready.

tasks.title: Migrate verification and GC (verify, gc)
tasks.end_state: .pi/prompts/verify.md preserves the final-fingerprint + no-post-fingerprint-write contract; keeps the durable-memory append before the final pass. .pi/prompts/gc.md requires the ready packet before memory/action and keeps memory read-only; .pi/memory.md is mandatory packet structure. State remains partial.

tasks.title: Migrate core lifecycle skills (development-lifecycle, memory, subagent-driven-development)
tasks.end_state: development-lifecycle/SKILL.md makes /init the first lifecycle hook. memory/SKILL.md uses .pi/memory.md. subagent-driven-development/SKILL.md uses explicit slug-local canonical artifacts and removes global OpenCode plan/memory paths.

tasks.title: Migrate research and verification references (gemini, opensrc, VERIFICATION_PROTOCOL)
tasks.end_state: gemini-large-context/SKILL.md and opensrc/references/example-workflow.md replace .active and global OpenCode paths. VERIFICATION_PROTOCOL.md removes (not repoints) cache/skip/post-success-append behavior; candidate evidence stays in per-slug PROGRESS.md before the final pass; final declaration remains external with no post-fingerprint write.

tasks.title: Expand portability verification
tasks.end_state: structural-check.sh scans all .pi/skills/** and fails on active .opencode runtime deps, the exact .opencode/artifacts/.active coordination path, and global verify logs (must NOT false-positive on legitimate text like participants.active or the bare substring .active). Asserts development-lifecycle makes /init the first hook. State remains partial.

tasks.title: Correct the settled away-sandbox runtime closure (closure.ts, confinement.test.ts, away-sandbox.json)
tasks.end_state: Mandatory .opencode closure members removed if present; Pi-native runtime + protected-context paths used; a copied .pi runtime works with .opencode absent; the packet and managed AGENTS region are protected from autonomous mutation. .pi/away-sandbox.json protected_paths/runtime_protected_paths add the five .pi context files (ROADMAP, user, tech-stack, state, memory) and the managed AGENTS region; .opencode/command/** remains protected as source; the sandbox manifest itself is protected.

tasks.title: Synchronize the away-sandbox feature contract (spec, plan, prd)
tasks.end_state: away-sandbox-runtime spec.md/plan.md/prd.json updated for closure membership, managed-region ownership, Pi-native context, and acceptance checks reflecting the fixed managed AGENTS region and protected context.

tasks.title: Reconcile canonical sandbox authority (DECISIONS, PLAN, AGENTS)
tasks.end_state: ADR-014 aligned with ADR-016 while the managed boilerplate hash is proven unchanged (marker-bounded block byte-identical to the fixture). State remains partial.
tasks.verify: rg -q '^## ADR-014:' .pi/artifacts/pi-template/DECISIONS.md && rg -q '^## ADR-016:' .pi/artifacts/pi-template/DECISIONS.md && bash .opencode/tool/structural-check.sh && rg -q '^initialization_status: partial$' .pi/state.md

tasks.title: Synchronize autonomous-away-loop (spec, plan, prd)
tasks.end_state: autonomous-away-loop spec.md/plan.md/prd.json require sole default .pi/ROADMAP.md, exact roadmap grammar (roadmap_schema_version: 1, monotonic last_issued_id, immutable RM-NNN), source-backed /create, eligibility only for Ready + away-ok + Open decisions: none, no roadmap mutation, protected Pi-native context, and the fixed AGENTS managed region. Gate 0.4 (added at P1.2) preserved until pi-native-init P8.3 completes.

tasks.title: Update development-only context (tech-stack, roadmap, state)
tasks.end_state: .opencode/tech-stack.md, roadmap.md, state.md describe the shipped Pi-native behavior while remaining explicitly development-only.

tasks.title: Final static gate and readiness promotion
tasks.end_state: Final exact assertions added to structural-check.sh. All static checks run while state is partial. Operator runs /reload or restarts Pi (GATE: do not promote before reload). In the reloaded session the checker reruns and rejects any intervening drift; only then .pi/state.md changes to initialization_status: ready + context_reload_required: false (written last); the complete no-write static pass reruns; no further production write. Then (operator-gated, no-write) away-sandbox-runtime D3 full tests/attestation/fingerprint rerun against final bytes; any failure reopens work with state back to partial before any repair write.
tasks.verify: bash -n .opencode/tool/structural-check.sh && bash .opencode/tool/structural-check.sh && rg -q '^initialization_status: ready$' .pi/state.md && rg -q '^context_reload_required: false$' .pi/state.md && git diff --check
